plan.notEnoughData: Not enough usage data to analyze plan efficiency yet.

context.noCompactionEvents: No compaction events detected. Consider using /compact in long conversations to reduce context size and cost.

efficiency.overuseDescription: turns sent to pricier model than needed

energy.geoCoverageHint: % of messages with detected inference region
energy.solarPanelsFootnote: Area of rooftop PV modules (~20% efficiency, 0.75 performance ratio) that, sited in {{region}}, would take exactly the selected time window to generate this period's total energy consumption. Scales with the regional annual solar irradiance and the chosen period length.
energy.windRotationsFootnote: Rotations of a typical modern 3 MW onshore wind turbine at ~15 RPM under a 35 % capacity factor — ~1.17 kWh per rotation at average output. Equivalently, one such turbine would need {{minutes}} min at its real-world average output (or {{ratedMinutes}} min at rated 3 MW) to generate your period's total energy.
energy.hydroTurbineFootnote: Volume of water that would need to pass through a typical modern hydroelectric turbine (~100 m head, ~90 % efficiency) to generate this period's energy — about 4,077 L per kWh, derived from E = m·g·h·η. High-head plants need less (Hoover Dam, 180 m: ~2,200 L/kWh); low-head run-of-river plants need much more.
energy.nuclearWasteFootnote: Engineered disposal-facility volume — not raw waste — if the same energy came from 100 % nuclear (~4 mL/kWh). Weighted blend of HLW emplacement per Posiva KBS-3 (~1,500× raw spent-fuel volume once copper canister, bentonite buffer, and thermally-spaced repository tunnels are counted — Onkalo excavates ~1 million m³ of rock for ~650 m³ of spent fuel), plus ILW (~5×) and LLW (~3×) disposal, using IAEA waste-inventory volume shares. HLW must be safely isolated and guarded for ~100,000 years before its radioactivity decays to the level of natural uranium ore.

journeys.coffeeWalk: to the coffee shop and back

energy.disclaimer: Estimates only — ±55% uncertainty. Anthropic does not publish per-request energy data. Not for regulatory use.
energy.noData: No energy data available for this period.

calc.title: How this is calculated
calc.intro: Every tile on this tab is derived from the token counts Anthropic's API returns for each message. Here is exactly how that token-level data becomes the kWh, kg CO₂, and equivalent figures shown above, using your actual period's numbers so you can audit the math.
calc.totals: Raw total {{raw}} kWh × PUE {{pue}} = {{totalKwh}} kWh consumed. At {{region}} grid intensity {{gridIntensity}} gCO₂/kWh, that is {{co2Kg}} kg CO₂.
calc.equivHeader: How the equivalents were derived from {{co2Kg}} kg CO₂ / {{totalKwh}} kWh:

eq.train: Long-distance train: {{co2Kg}} kg ÷ 0.006 kg CO₂/pkm = {{value}} km
eq.transit: Local transit: {{co2Kg}} kg ÷ 0.030 kg CO₂/pkm = {{value}} km
eq.nuclearWaste: Nuclear disposal volume: {{totalKwh}} kWh × 4 mL/kWh (engineered HLW+ILW+LLW repository, weighted) = {{value}}
eq.wind: Wind-turbine rotations: {{totalKwh}} kWh ÷ 1.17 kWh/rotation (3 MW turbine at 15 RPM, 35 % CF) = {{value}} rotations ≈ {{minutes}} min of real-world spinning
eq.hydro: Hydro-turbine water volume: {{totalKwh}} kWh × 4,077 L/kWh (~100 m head, 90 % η via E = m·g·h·η) = {{value}}

methodology.label: Model energy rates
methodology.value: Derived from Google's 2025 Gemini inference whitepaper (0.24 Wh/median text query) and Epoch AI 2024 token-level estimates, scaled by model class (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus). Formula details in /doc/analysis/energy-dashboard/01-estimation-model.md.

pue.label: Data-center overhead
pue.value: PUE 1.2 — Uptime Institute 2023 hyperscale average (Google, AWS, Azure publish 1.10–1.20).

gridIntensity.label: Grid carbon intensity
gridIntensity.value: US: EPA eGRID2022. EU: European Environment Agency (EEA) 2024. Asia-Pacific & global: IEA 2024. National agencies used where available.

solarYield.label: Solar panel yield
solarYield.value: Regional annual GHI from PVGIS (Europe) / NREL NSRDB (Americas) / World Bank GSA (global), multiplied by 20% panel efficiency × 0.75 performance ratio. The tile scales this annual yield down to the selected period to show the panel area required to produce exactly this period's energy in that timeframe.

windTurbine.label: Wind turbine reference
windTurbine.value: Modern 3 MW onshore turbine at 15 RPM and ~35 % capacity factor (IRENA Renewable Power Generation Costs 2023, IEA Renewables 2024). Energy per rotation = 3 MW × 4 s × 0.35 ≈ 1.17 kWh at average output (~3.33 kWh at rated).

hydroTurbine.label: Hydroelectric turbine reference
hydroTurbine.value: Representative modern hydroelectric plant at ~100 m net head with ~90 % combined turbine+generator efficiency. Derived from the physical relation E = m·g·h·η with g = 9.81 m/s², giving 3,600,000 J ÷ (9.81 × 100 × 0.9) ≈ 4,077 L/kWh. Close to the global capacity-weighted average (Three Gorges ~95 m, Itaipu ~118 m); high-head plants such as Hoover Dam (180 m) need ~2,200 L/kWh.

carKm.label: Car emissions
carKm.value: 120 gCO₂/km — EU new-car fleet average, EEA 2024.

transit.label: Local transit emissions
transit.value: 30 gCO₂/passenger-km — weighted blend of urban bus (~27), subway/metro (~8), and tram/light rail from IEA Transport Emissions (2024) and EEA Transport & Environment Reporting Mechanism 2024.

train.label: Long-distance train emissions
train.value: 6 gCO₂/passenger-km — European electrified intercity rail average, UIC Railway Handbook on Energy and CO₂ Emissions and EEA 2024.

tree.label: Tree absorption
tree.value: 21 kg CO₂ absorbed per year by a mature tree — US Forest Service / EPA.

gasoline.label: Gasoline combustion
gasoline.value: 2.31 kg CO₂ per liter — US EPA tailpipe emissions factor.

nuclearWaste.label: Nuclear disposal volume
nuclearWaste.value: ~4 mL/kWh engineered repository volume — not raw waste. Weighted across HLW disposal per Posiva KBS-3 / Onkalo (~1,500× raw spent-fuel volume after copper canister, bentonite buffer, and thermal tunnel spacing), ILW (~5×) and LLW (~3×) disposal, using IAEA volume shares. References: Posiva 2012 safety case, SKB TR-11-01, IAEA Radioactive Waste Inventory.

settings.planAutoDetectHint: Auto-detect relies on intermittent telemetry data and is often unable to determine your plan. Setting this manually is recommended.
settings.monthlyFeeHint: Override the default fee for your plan type, or set a custom amount.
settings.savedReload: Saved! Reload to see updated dashboard.

pricing.title: Token Pricing (per 1M tokens)
pricing.source: Source: Anthropic API pricing — last updated {{date}} (auto-refreshed weekly). Costs shown are equivalent API rates, not subscription charges.
